title: Can't connect to Outlook
creator: klcorey
content:
Hello. I am trying to get Thunderbird Mobile to connect to my work e-mail. myname@ourdomain.com is hosted by Outlook. I have tried many times using the manual setup for the account. Every time I type in password at M/S I get

AUTHENTICATION ERROR. The server returned the following message:

AUTHENTICATION failed.

But when I check at mysignins.microsoft.com, it shows Successful Sign-in Thunderbird Android.

I have tried the Export to Mobile function from desktop, but the profile does not show as desktop's configuration only worked properly using the MICROSOFT E-MAIL EXCHANGE SERVER.

I went ahead and installed Outlook app on the phone so I could get my e-mail, but after only half a day, I hate Outlook. Please help me get T'bird working.

Thanks
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:150.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/150.0;tb_version:18.0;os:Android
